briefdescription.para: Returns the serial number of the headstage compatible with Axon* functions,.
Returns the serial number of the headstage compatible with MCC* functions,.
Return the channel of the currently selected head stage.
Return the unit prefixes used by MIES in comparison to the MCC app.

parameterdescription.para: clamp mode (pass NaN for doesn't matter)

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, string ctrl, variable headStage, variable value=defaultValue, variable sendToAll=defaultValue, variable checkBeforeWrite=defaultValue, variable selectAmp=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: AI_UpdateAmpModel

briefdescription.para: Update the AmpStorageWave entry and send the value to the amplifier.

detaileddescription.para: Additionally setting the GUI value if the given headstage is the selected one and a value has been passed.

parameterdescription.para: MIES headstage number, must be in the range [0, NUM_HEADSTAGES]
[optional: defaults to the controls value] value to set. values is in MIES units, see AI_SendToAmp() and there the description of usePrefixes.
[optional: defaults to the state of the checkbox] should the value be send to all active headstages (true) or just to the given one (false)
[optional, defaults to false] (ignored for getter functions) check the current value and do nothing if it is equal within some tolerance to the one written
[optional, defaults to true] Select the amplifier before use, some callers might save time in doing that once themselves.

detaileddescription.para: Disallows setting single controls for outside callers as AI_UpdateAmpModel should be used for that.

briefdescription.para: Sync the settings from the GUI to the amp storage wave and the MCC application.
Synchronizes the AmpStorageWave to the amplifier GUI control.

parameterdescription.para: MIES headstage number, must be in the range [0, NUM_HEADSTAGES]
[optional, defaults to all controls] name of the control being updated

briefdescription.para: Convert amplifier controls to row labels for AmpStorageWave
Executes MCC auto zero command if the baseline current exceeds ZERO_TOLERANCE.
Auto pipette zeroing Quicker than MCC auto pipette offset.

parameterdescription.para: MIES headstage number, must be in the range [0, NUM_HEADSTAGES]

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable headstage, variable clampMode, variable *DAGain, variable *ADGain, string *DAUnit, string *ADUnit)
memberdef.name: AI_QueryGainsUnitsForClampMode

briefdescription.para: Query the MCC application for the gains and units of the given clamp mode.

detaileddescription.para: Assumes that the correct amplifier is already selected!

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable headStage, variable clampMode, variable DAGain, variable ADGain, string DAUnit, string ADUnit)
memberdef.name: AI_UpdateChanAmpAssign

briefdescription.para: Update the ChanAmpAssign and ChanAmpAssignUnit waves according to the passed clamp mode with the gains and units.
Assert on invalid clamp modes, does nothing otherwise.
Return true if the given clamp mode is valid.

parameterdescription.para: A text list of amplifier serial numbers without leading zeroes Ex. "834001;435003;836059", "0;" starts the MCC in Demo mode Duplicate serial numbers are ignored as well as amplifier titles for the duplicates. For each unique serial number one MCC is opened.
[optional, defaults to blank] MCC gui window title

simplesect.para: 1 if all unique MCCs specified in ampSerialNumList were opened, 0 if one or more MCCs specified in ampSerialNumList were not able to be opened

briefdescription.para: Gets the serial numbers of all open MCCs.

simplesect.para: a 1D FREE wave containing amplifier serial numbers without leading zeroes

briefdescription.para: Return a path to the MCC.

detaileddescription.para: Hardcoded as Igor does not allow to query that information.
Distinguishes between i386 and x64 Igor versions

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable headstage, variable clampMode, variable *ADGain, variable *DAGain)
memberdef.name: AI_RetrieveGains

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable headStage, variable mode, variable zeroStep=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: AI_SetClampMode

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable headStage, variable mode, variable func, variable value, variable checkBeforeWrite=defaultValue, variable usePrefixes=defaultValue, variable selectAmp=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: AI_SendToAmp

briefdescription.para: AI Interface with the Axon/MCC amplifiers
